full_text:
Chen Hua (Yuanyao) 陳化 (元耀)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Hua (陳化), styledYuanyao (元耀), was born in Runan commandery. Rebutted Cao Pi. Had high moral character. Chen Hua was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
